  • Constructor Details

    • VoteSiteManager

      public VoteSiteManager(VotingPluginMain plugin)

  • Method Details

    • loadVoteSites

      public List<VoteSite> loadVoteSites()
      Reloads votesites from config and returns the backing list.

    • getVoteSiteName

      public String getVoteSiteName(boolean checkEnabled, String... urls)
      Attempts to map a URL / display name / key to the configured "site name".
      Parameters:
      checkEnabled - Whether to only consider enabled vote sites.
      urls - One or more URLs / names to resolve.
      Returns:
      The resolved vote site name, or the first provided value if no match

    • getVoteSite

      public VoteSite getVoteSite(String site, boolean checkEnabled)
      Resolves a VoteSite from an identifier. - Matches on key or display name - Can optionally auto-create vote sites (same behavior as VotingPluginMain)

    • getVoteSitesEnabled

      public ArrayList<VoteSite> getVoteSitesEnabled()

    • getVoteSiteServiceSite

      public String getVoteSiteServiceSite(String name)
      Converts an input name/url into the configured service site URL if possible. If no mapping exists, returns the input (original behavior).

    • hasVoteSite

      public boolean hasVoteSite(String site)

    • isVoteSite

      public boolean isVoteSite(String voteSite)

    • getVoteSites

      public List<VoteSite> getVoteSites()

    • setVoteSites

      public void setVoteSites(List<VoteSite> voteSites)
